value.body:
## Context

Cycle stores ticket data in Git-backed repositories. Small teams need clear remote setup and recovery flows when push/pull diverges or fails.

## Outcome

Repository settings guide users through selecting a remote, testing credentials, pulling ticket data, pushing local changes, and recovering from conflicts.

## Acceptance criteria

- Users can view configured remotes and choose the Cycle sync remote/pointer.
- Pull and push operations expose progress, success, failure, and retry affordances.
- Divergence/conflict states explain what happened and provide a safe recovery path.
- Network or auth failures are recorded in repository status and user notifications.
- Tests cover remote selection validation and failure-state mapping.

frontmatter.title: Add remote setup, pull/push, and conflict recovery workflows

value.title: Add remote setup, pull/push, and conflict recovery workflows
